summary: EXP-450 addresses HOL-HIERARCHY c2 — 7 holes routed across ISS-2273..2279 — with 6 structured integration patches (P0-P3 Part 2 internal restructure + new SC subsections 2.13 κ-divide-by-zero / 2.14 ring-magnet 1,660:1 / 2.15 FSF version-unstable; P4 V13 coordinate promotion operator-choice-required; P5-P6 Part 1 tier framing + Part 1.1 overdetermined acknowledgement) plus 3 deferred items (HIER-PHASE2-05 callout-box follow-on M1; HIER-PHASE2-06 Kill-Shot rename operator-decision; HIER-PHASE2-07 within-Part-2 ranking partially-addressed). Recommend decider push P0+P1+P2+P3 as a coordinated holistic bundle to the curmudgeon priority queue; P4 surfaced to operator before pushing; P5+P6 can ride same bundle or split. Close ISS-2273..2279 after the bundle integrates.
